name: io.github.wdsmcguigan/promptatrium
description: Pull your versioned PromptAtrium assets (rules, skills, commands, prompts, mcp-server configs) into Claude Code, Cursor, and VS Code.

environmentVariables.name: PROMPTATRIUM_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: A PromptAtrium personal access token (read scope), from Settings -> Tokens.

environmentVariables.name: PROMPTATRIUM_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override the PromptAtrium API base URL (defaults to the hosted service).
